code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  mut done = false
  while not done
    match io.read_line()
    when None
      done = true
    when Some(line)
      let n = string.len(line)
      mut i = 0
      mut found = false
      while not found and i < n
        match string.byte_at(line, i)
        when Some(b)
          if b == 61
            found = true
          else
            i = i + 1
          end
        when None
          i = n
        end
      end
      if found and i > 0
        let key = string.substring(line, 0, i)
        let value = string.substring(line, i + 1, n)
        println("#{key}:#{value}")
      end
    end
  end
end
